title: ZXSpace Game Modes
description: Understand the verified ZXSpace solo city-defence mode and the To Verify release status for multiplayer menu behavior.
summary: ZXSpace release-ready documentation centers on the verified solo city-defence shooter loop.
heroImageAlt: Placeholder artwork for pending ZXSpace game modes image
sourceNotes: Central ZX Series documentation verifies the solo city-defence formation shooter path.
Current source contains multiplayer menu flags and paths, but final public multiplayer behavior is To Verify before release-facing promotion.

sections.heading: Solo play
paragraphs: Solo play is the verified ZXSpace gameplay path documented for release readiness.
The solo loop covers alien formations, city defence, shields, lives, wave completion, score chasing, coin rewards, power-ups, and rewarded continue.

sections.heading: Mode status
paragraphs: ZXSpace source contains Local PVP and World PVP menu paths, and current feature flags should be checked before final public release copy is approved.
This documentation does not describe a separate finished multiplayer gameplay contract until that release behavior is verified.

sections.heading: What to choose
paragraphs: Use Solo play for current documented progression, achievements, score ranking, and coin rewards.
Review this page again before release if multiplayer menu availability changes.

images.alt: Placeholder artwork for ZXSpace game modes
images.caption: Game modes artwork pending

faq.question: Is ZXSpace multiplayer documented as a release feature?
faq.answer: No. The verified documentation focuses on Solo play. Multiplayer menu behavior remains To Verify before final public release copy.
